questions.text: You are tracking inventory and work orders for Adventure Works Cycles. Configure Excel to save an AutoRecover version of each open file every '2' minutes

All the cells on the 'Work Sites' worksheet are unlocked. On the worksheet, lock only cells F4:F10. Ensure that users can select and format cells after protecting the worksheet. Protect the worksheet using the password '123'
On the 'Sales Projections' worksheet, in the cells C8:G8, use the fill series feature to project a growth of 27.5 percent per year for the 'London' office

Adventure Works Cycles plans to send $700,$800, and $900 gift cards to loyal customers each quarter of the year to celebrate its 50th anniversary. On the 'Loyalty' worksheet, in the cell C4, enter a formula that uses the 'RANDARRAY' function to randomly determine the gift card amount each customer will receive for each quarter. Note: You can use arithmetic operations or additional functions as part of the formula
On the 'Orders' worksheet, in cell G3, revise the formula to display the total 'Quantity' of parts that have a 'Due Date' before today. Do not include today's date.

On the 'Locations' worksheet, create a chart that displays the 'Units in Production' at each location as a Clustered Column and the 'Maximum Units' at each location as a Line with Markers on the same chart. Display the 'Location' cities as the horizontal axis labels
